TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Bngwan_圓山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Bngwan hiya ga ksobih ki qalang Sengan, glax syax na llyung Mnibu, ini knbawiq uyi, akya saying kbhul meta. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 imi na Bngwan ga, maki bbinah qalang ini ga ksobih syax ini ga rgyax, baha hmcwa qalang Bngwan ga mnaki binah qalang Sen-gan, ro ksobih syax ki rgyax. Bngwan的意思,有" . pinyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang Bngwan qani hiya ga, garing akya qutux qbhul miman ckawas, nyan maki Cquliq mqyanux, cquliq naha ga minkahul Goagan ski cqani hkani xqayus na kkian, puqing ga musa naha qalang Knbung ha, mehong lga uka pinqmahan nha ro hkani loyi xqayus na kkian, musa naha tnqalang, mehong lga maki uyi Cquliq knahul qalang Syanoh,Talah, mwah cqani tnmuyax, ini ga yome, babaw nya lga mwah sexu Ipun la, ro psalun naha ro pslyun naha kya qutux kki'an qa Tayal glux qutux qalang Mnoyan qani, tehok qa ryax sexu Cyukok lga tgaring kblayan kisya la, baha hmcwa piyux qqhoniq maki Taypinsan, kmut naha khoniq ro matu ski Lotung, mica qa piyux Kahat mwah uyi la, hriqun naha gaga na Tayal uyi. ro qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal saying kawas sta qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal tyugan kawas lga, knahul llyung Gogan qalang Hkawan ro Gihing pinsqunan mpux magan cinmuyax, mpitu mpux saying kawas mwah qalang qani, ro msqun gmoyax mrhow ka knahul Gihing mwah na Pehu Talan. 1922-1923(大正 11-12年)間,由Gogan社群 之 Hkawan,Gihing Pehu Talan為頭目. tayal qa nyan qalang Bngwan mwani 人口概況 mwani ga magan cinmuyax mpux spat cquliq qyanux maki cqani, qalang na Syanoh ryaniq mtiyu. ro maki qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal kawas ga, laxan naha qalang qani, qabax cquliq musa qalang Syanoh la, ro maki qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpitu mpux saying kawas ga, tyaba behuy ro wayal horun qsya qabax qalang qani. mwani ga sthay cipak cquliq maki cani, piyux cquliq wayal binah qalang ini ga musa heci, akya miman kawas yunga lga uka calay Tayal pklahang qalang qani la, mwani ga uka uyi cquliq kmayal ke Tayal la, baha hmcwa wayal qabax bnheci naha laro, ini baqi kmayan uyi ke Tayal uyi qabax laqi kinbahan. qalang Bngwan hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Bngwan hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya,pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kblay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. ,讀書. rryaniq qalang 部落交通 u'teng su haya ga, kahul su Lutung ro si glgan ryaniq 台7丙shoyu skura Sense musa, ro tehik su hongu清水lga, akya ini kbsyaq thehok su uyi qalang Bnwan. 開車 路線一: 羅東鎮>台7丙>清水橋>圓山部落 ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 uka ki'an pklahang bnheci qa qalang Sengan qani hiya. . gaga qalang 部落文化 qalang Bngwan qani ga qalang Kahat, nanaq cipak cquliq ga Tayal. kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga uka cquliq kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, ro uka uyi kblay yaw na gaga cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Watan Suyan內容: maki cami hosyo 林班cyunga, garing 林班ro bsyaq i ini sami uluw pila cyunga ro, ro siga musa i musa shosyo ga maki cya pila nya, ro bsyaq qa kmaki kya i obih kya ni neng, obih ni neng musa ku i hosyo lro mulu ku rangi Kahat la, muluw krangi Kahat lro, mwah su ptyawun mage mu ro, ini mu qbaq son mu, cbaqay misu maha musa ku galan i hosyu la, piyux hayi pila mage hiya ro, ro musa mage lga, baha hmcwa rangi mu cyunga ga kmayal maha a khnagi cya ha ki, khangi cya ha, ana saying cyugan mwah glux isu ma, maha uka hayi cquliq ma, ro musa lga, piyux rasun mu la, payat he ana kingan ga magan cami he musa cami mage la, garing mage sami lga, piyux hayi pila galun ga, us ga garing saniq musa ro gbyan mwah, baha hmcwa mtiyaw sami ca ga, piyux galun su qhoniq ga, piyux pila nya, pila ni tnbbaw ca, ro kyalun mu rangi mu, payat he ana kingan cyugan he ro, babaw nya lga maras ku saying he, maras saying he Tayal la, bsyaq ca maki sami mage lro, (maki inu?) babaw qani, magan inu lawpan myan ga, musa sami ira kya, musa qumah kya, musa cu ga kruma piyux yaw ga musa sami kya ga, ro babaw nya lga, ini swali knut qhoniq, ini swaliy林班uyi, mehong lga mwah cami muyaw la, mwah muyaw lro mwah kmuya cikay ramat uyi, kya i ici neng bsyaw muya ku ramat, ryax nasa ga ini qbaq mlahang ramat yaqih nerang nya ro, galan rengwa rangi mu maha cyux tyawun kya son mu ro, maki ma kyalun mu hiya, ana knwan su mwah ga uya ma haw, musa ku loyi ga ro tgaring ptuwun鋼骨la, innglisan ptyawun 鋼骨qani , siga baq su mkaraw, baq cu i trkax ro baq su nanu ga baq su mtiyaw cikay ha ga siyon Kahat ro, ro bsyaq maki kya lga, kmayal maha hkangi rangi su ki maha, baha hmcwa nyan nya tayux cami qaniyat mtiyaw, qaniyat ro hkangi ma, hkangi bes su loyi ma, hkangi qalang ta loyi, musa sami tiyaw la, mlahang muyaw la, ro garing arwa lga, si cu kaki muyax la, baha hmcwa yaqih he kneril mu ga, yaqih he nya si cu kaki muyax, ro muya cya ramat la, muya cikay ramat (piyux qmayah su ku?) piyux ga cyux biqan laqi laru, (pisa laqi su?) qutux neril qutux rikuy (nyan maki qalang qabax?) cyux maki. misuw qani ga nyux ku maki muyax ro wal i magan,tuyu ckawas ga wayal neril mu la, ro kingal nanaq maki muyax, laqi mu uyi ga cyux maki heci ro kintiyaw, ro uka nanu yaw mu lga musa ku mtiyaw qmayah, musa krmaw mtiyaw i laqi, ro bsyaq bsyaq bsyaq lga bsyaq la akya tuyu tiyu kawas la,ro mwani lga kingan nanaq maki muyaw la, ro laqi ga nya maki yaw naha nanaq cyux mtiyaw nanaq tanux uyi laqi uyi ru, mago mu uyi cyu mulu yaw maki tanux uyi, ro ini mwah mita kruma siga mhngaw mwah i kintayux kingan, ro qnxan mu ga ini cu mtiyaw uy laro, .
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki qalaŋ s~ɕeŋan, ɣlax s~ɕjax na lljuŋ mniβu, ini knβawiq uji, akja s~ɕajiŋ kβħul meta. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** imi na βŋwan ɣa, maki ββinaħ qalaŋ ini ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕjax ini ɣa rɣjax, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa qalaŋ βŋwan ɣa mnaki βinaħ qalaŋ s~ɕen-ɣan, ro ks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕjax ki rɣjax. βŋwan***,*" . pinjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ βŋwan qani ħija ɣa, ɣariŋ akja qutux qβħul miman ʦ~ʨkawas~ɕ, njan maki ʦ~ʨquliq mqjanux, ʦ~ʨquliq naħa ɣa minkaħul ɣoaɣan s~ɕki ʦ~ʨqani ħkani xqajus~ɕ na kkian, puqiŋ ɣa mus~ɕa naħa qalaŋ knβuŋ ħa, meħoŋ lɣa uka pinqmaħan nħa ro ħkani loji xqajus~ɕ na kkian, mus~ɕa naħa tnqalaŋ, meħoŋ lɣa maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq knaħul qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ,talaħ, mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tnmujax, ini ɣa jome, βaβaw nja lɣa mwaħ s~ɕexu ipun la, ro ps~ɕalun naħa ro ps~ɕljun naħa kja qutux kkiʔan qa tajal ɣlux qutux qalaŋ mnojan qani, teħok qa rjax s~ɕexu ʦ~ʨjukok lɣa tɣariŋ kβlajan kis~ɕja la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa pijux qqħoniq maki tajpins~ɕan, kmut naħa kħoniq ro matu s~ɕki lotuŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa pijux kaħat mwaħ uji la, ħriqun naħa ɣaɣa na tajal uji. ro qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ s~ɕta qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal tjuɣan kawas~ɕ lɣa, knaħul lljuŋ ɣoɣan qalaŋ ħkawan ro ɣiħiŋ pins~ɕqunan mpux maɣan ʦ~ʨinmujax, mpitu mpux s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ mwaħ qalaŋ qani, ro ms~ɕqun ɣmojax mrħow ka knaħul ɣiħiŋ mwaħ na peħu talan. ****-****(** **-***)*,*ɣoɣan** * ħkawan,ɣiħiŋ peħu talan***. tajal qa njan qalaŋ βŋwan mwani **** mwani ɣa maɣan ʦ~ʨinmujax mpux s~ɕpat ʦ~ʨquliq qjanux maki ʦ~ʨqani, qalaŋ na s~ɕjanoħ rjaniq mtiju. ro maki qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal kawas~ɕ ɣa, laxan naħa qalaŋ qani, qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ la, ro maki qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpitu mpux s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ ɣa, tjaβa βeħuj ro wajal ħorun qs~ɕja qaβax qalaŋ qani. mwani ɣa s~ɕtħaj ʦ~ʨipak ʦ~ʨquliq maki ʦ~ʨani, pijux ʦ~ʨquliq wajal βinaħ qalaŋ ini ɣa mus~ɕa ħeʦ~ʨi, akja miman kawas~ɕ juŋa lɣa uka ʦ~ʨalaj tajal pklaħaŋ qalaŋ qani la, mwani ɣa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq kmajal ke tajal la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa wajal qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa laro, ini βaqi kmajan uji ke tajal uji qaβax laqi kinβaħan. qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja,paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβlaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ,**. rrjaniq qalaŋ **** uʔteŋ s~ɕu ħaja ɣa, kaħul s~ɕu lutuŋ ro s~ɕi ɣlɣan rjaniq ***s~ɕħoju s~ɕkura s~ɕens~ɕe mus~ɕa, ro teħik s~ɕu ħoŋu**lɣa, akja ini kβs~ɕjaq tħeħok s~ɕu uji qalaŋ βnwan. ** ***: ***>***>***>**** kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** uka kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi qa qalaŋ s~ɕeŋan qani ħija. . ɣaɣa qalaŋ **** qalaŋ βŋwan qani ɣa qalaŋ kaħat, nanaq ʦ~ʨipak ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa tajal. kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, ro uka uji kβlaj jaw na ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa watan s~ɕujan**: maki ʦ~ʨami ħos~ɕjo **ʦ~ʨjuŋa, ɣariŋ **ro βs~ɕjaq i ini s~ɕami uluw pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa ro, ro s~ɕiɣa mus~ɕa i mus~ɕa s~ɕħos~ɕjo ɣa maki ʦ~ʨja pila nja, ro βs~ɕjaq qa kmaki kja i oβiħ kja ni neŋ, oβiħ ni neŋ mus~ɕa ku i ħos~ɕjo lro mulu ku raŋi kaħat la, muluw kraŋi kaħat lro, mwaħ s~ɕu ptjawun maɣe mu ro, ini mu qβaq s~ɕon mu, ʦ~ʨβaqaj mis~ɕu maħa mus~ɕa ku ɣalan i ħos~ɕju la, pijux ħaji pila maɣe ħija ro, ro mus~ɕa maɣe lɣa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa raŋi mu ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa kmajal maħa a kħnaɣi ʦ~ʨja ħa ki, kħaŋi ʦ~ʨja ħa, ana s~ɕajiŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣan mwaħ ɣlux is~ɕu ma, maħa uka ħaji ʦ~ʨquliq ma, ro mus~ɕa lɣa, pijux ras~ɕun mu la, pajat ħe ana kiŋan ɣa maɣan ʦ~ʨami ħe mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨami maɣe la, ɣariŋ maɣe s~ɕami lɣa, pijux ħaji pila ɣalun ɣa, us~ɕ ɣa ɣariŋ s~ɕaniq mus~ɕa ro ɣβjan mwaħ, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa mtijaw s~ɕami ʦ~ʨa ɣa, pijux ɣalun s~ɕu qħoniq ɣa, pijux pila nja, pila ni tnββaw ʦ~ʨa, ro kjalun mu raŋi mu, pajat ħe ana kiŋan ʦ~ʨjuɣan ħe ro, βaβaw nja lɣa maras~ɕ ku s~ɕajiŋ ħe, maras~ɕ s~ɕajiŋ ħe tajal la, βs~ɕjaq ʦ~ʨa maki s~ɕami maɣe lro, (maki inu?) βaβaw qani, maɣan inu lawpan mjan ɣa, mus~ɕa s~ɕami ira kja, mus~ɕa qumaħ kja, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu ɣa kruma pijux jaw ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕami kja ɣa, ro βaβaw nja lɣa, ini s~ɕwali knut qħoniq, ini s~ɕwalij**uji, meħoŋ lɣa mwaħ ʦ~ʨami mujaw la, mwaħ mujaw lro mwaħ kmuja ʦ~ʨikaj ramat uji, kja i iʦ~ʨi neŋ βs~ɕjaw muja ku ramat, rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ini qβaq mlaħaŋ ramat jaqiħ neraŋ nja ro, ɣalan reŋwa raŋi mu maħa ʦ~ʨjux tjawun kja s~ɕon mu ro, maki ma kjalun mu ħija, ana knwan s~ɕu mwaħ ɣa uja ma ħaw, mus~ɕa ku loji ɣa ro tɣariŋ ptuwun**la, inŋlis~ɕan ptjawun **qani , s~ɕiɣa βaq s~ɕu mkaraw, βaq ʦ~ʨu i trkax ro βaq s~ɕu nanu ɣa βaq s~ɕu mtijaw ʦ~ʨikaj ħa ɣa s~ɕijon kaħat ro, ro βs~ɕjaq maki kja lɣa, kmajal maħa ħkaŋi raŋi s~ɕu ki maħa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa njan nja tajux ʦ~ʨami qanijat mtijaw, qanijat ro ħkaŋi ma, ħkaŋi βes~ɕ s~ɕu loji ma, ħkaŋi qalaŋ ta loji, mus~ɕa s~ɕami tijaw la, mlaħaŋ mujaw la, ro ɣariŋ arwa lɣa, s~ɕi ʦ~ʨu kaki mujax la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa jaqiħ ħe kneril mu ɣa, jaqiħ ħe nja s~ɕi ʦ~ʨu kaki mujax, ro muja ʦ~ʨja ramat la, muja ʦ~ʨikaj ramat (pijux qmajaħ s~ɕu ku?) pijux ɣa ʦ~ʨjux βiqan laqi laru, (pis~ɕa laqi s~ɕu?) qutux neril qutux rikuj (njan maki qalaŋ qaβax?) ʦ~ʨjux maki. mis~ɕuw qani ɣa njux ku maki mujax ro wal i maɣan,tuju ʦ~ʨkawas~ɕ ɣa wajal neril mu la, ro kiŋal nanaq maki mujax, laqi mu uji ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki ħeʦ~ʨi ro kintijaw, ro uka nanu jaw mu lɣa mus~ɕa ku mtijaw qmajaħ, mus~ɕa krmaw mtijaw i laqi, ro βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq lɣa βs~ɕjaq la akja tuju tiju kawas~ɕ la,ro mwani lɣa kiŋan nanaq maki mujaw la, ro laqi ɣa nja maki jaw naħa nanaq ʦ~ʨjux mtijaw nanaq tanux uji laqi uji ru, maɣo mu uji ʦ~ʨju mulu jaw maki tanux uji, ro ini mwaħ mita kruma s~ɕiɣa mħŋaw mwaħ i kintajux kiŋan, ro qnxan mu ɣa ini ʦ~ʨu mtijaw uj laro, .
S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Bngwan hiya ga ksobih ki qalang Sengan, glax syax na llyung Mnibu, ini knbawiq uyi, akya saying kbhul meta. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 imi na Bngwan ga, maki bbinah qalang ini ga ksobih syax ini ga rgyax, baha hmcwa qalang Bngwan ga mnaki binah qalang Sen-gan, ro ksobih syax ki rgyax. Bngwan的意思,有" . pinyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 qalang Bngwan qani hiya ga, garing akya qutux qbhul miman ckawas, nyan maki Cquliq mqyanux, cquliq naha ga minkahul Goagan ski cqani hkani xqayus na kkian, puqing ga musa naha qalang Knbung ha, mehong lga uka pinqmahan nha ro hkani loyi xqayus na kkian, musa naha tnqalang, mehong lga maki uyi Cquliq knahul qalang Syanoh,Talah, mwah cqani tnmuyax, ini ga yome, babaw nya lga mwah sexu Ipun la, ro psalun naha ro pslyun naha kya qutux kki'an qa Tayal glux qutux qalang Mnoyan qani, tehok qa ryax sexu Cyukok lga tgaring kblayan kisya la, baha hmcwa piyux qqhoniq maki Taypinsan, kmut naha khoniq ro matu ski Lotung, mica qa piyux Kahat mwah uyi la, hriqun naha gaga na Tayal uyi. ro qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal saying kawas sta qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal tyugan kawas lga, knahul llyung Gogan qalang Hkawan ro Gihing pinsqunan mpux magan cinmuyax, mpitu mpux saying kawas mwah qalang qani, ro msqun gmoyax mrhow ka knahul Gihing mwah na Pehu Talan. 1922-1923(大正 11-12年)間,由Gogan社群 之 Hkawan,Gihing Pehu Talan為頭目. tayal qa nyan qalang Bngwan mwani 人口概況 mwani ga magan cinmuyax mpux spat cquliq qyanux maki cqani, qalang na Syanoh ryaniq mtiyu. ro maki qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpusal kawas ga, laxan naha qalang qani, qabax cquliq musa qalang Syanoh la, ro maki qutux seng mqesu kbhul mpitu mpux saying kawas ga, tyaba behuy ro wayal horun qsya qabax qalang qani. mwani ga sthay cipak cquliq maki cani, piyux cquliq wayal binah qalang ini ga musa heci, akya miman kawas yunga lga uka calay Tayal pklahang qalang qani la, mwani ga uka uyi cquliq kmayal ke Tayal la, baha hmcwa wayal qabax bnheci naha laro, ini baqi kmayan uyi ke Tayal uyi qabax laqi kinbahan. qalang Bngwan hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Bngwan hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya,pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kblay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. ,讀書. rryaniq qalang 部落交通 u'teng su haya ga, kahul su Lutung ro si glgan ryaniq 台7丙shoyu skura Sense musa, ro tehik su hongu清水lga, akya ini kbsyaq thehok su uyi qalang Bnwan. 開車 路線一: 羅東鎮>台7丙>清水橋>圓山部落 ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 uka ki'an pklahang bnheci qa qalang Sengan qani hiya. . gaga qalang 部落文化 qalang Bngwan qani ga qalang Kahat, nanaq cipak cquliq ga Tayal. kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga uka cquliq kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, ro uka uyi kblay yaw na gaga cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. . cipak kinbaqan na gaga Watan Suyan內容: maki cami hosyo 林班cyunga, garing 林班ro bsyaq i ini sami uluw pila cyunga ro, ro siga musa i musa shosyo ga maki cya pila nya, ro bsyaq qa kmaki kya i obih kya ni neng, obih ni neng musa ku i hosyo lro mulu ku rangi Kahat la, muluw krangi Kahat lro, mwah su ptyawun mage mu ro, ini mu qbaq son mu, cbaqay misu maha musa ku galan i hosyu la, piyux hayi pila mage hiya ro, ro musa mage lga, baha hmcwa rangi mu cyunga ga kmayal maha a khnagi cya ha ki, khangi cya ha, ana saying cyugan mwah glux isu ma, maha uka hayi cquliq ma, ro musa lga, piyux rasun mu la, payat he ana kingan ga magan cami he musa cami mage la, garing mage sami lga, piyux hayi pila galun ga, us ga garing saniq musa ro gbyan mwah, baha hmcwa mtiyaw sami ca ga, piyux galun su qhoniq ga, piyux pila nya, pila ni tnbbaw ca, ro kyalun mu rangi mu, payat he ana kingan cyugan he ro, babaw nya lga maras ku saying he, maras saying he Tayal la, bsyaq ca maki sami mage lro, (maki inu?) babaw qani, magan inu lawpan myan ga, musa sami ira kya, musa qumah kya, musa cu ga kruma piyux yaw ga musa sami kya ga, ro babaw nya lga, ini swali knut qhoniq, ini swaliy林班uyi, mehong lga mwah cami muyaw la, mwah muyaw lro mwah kmuya cikay ramat uyi, kya i ici neng bsyaw muya ku ramat, ryax nasa ga ini qbaq mlahang ramat yaqih nerang nya ro, galan rengwa rangi mu maha cyux tyawun kya son mu ro, maki ma kyalun mu hiya, ana knwan su mwah ga uya ma haw, musa ku loyi ga ro tgaring ptuwun鋼骨la, innglisan ptyawun 鋼骨qani , siga baq su mkaraw, baq cu i trkax ro baq su nanu ga baq su mtiyaw cikay ha ga siyon Kahat ro, ro bsyaq maki kya lga, kmayal maha hkangi rangi su ki maha, baha hmcwa nyan nya tayux cami qaniyat mtiyaw, qaniyat ro hkangi ma, hkangi bes su loyi ma, hkangi qalang ta loyi, musa sami tiyaw la, mlahang muyaw la, ro garing arwa lga, si cu kaki muyax la, baha hmcwa yaqih he kneril mu ga, yaqih he nya si cu kaki muyax, ro muya cya ramat la, muya cikay ramat (piyux qmayah su ku?) piyux ga cyux biqan laqi laru, (pisa laqi su?) qutux neril qutux rikuy (nyan maki qalang qabax?) cyux maki. misuw qani ga nyux ku maki muyax ro wal i magan,tuyu ckawas ga wayal neril mu la, ro kingal nanaq maki muyax, laqi mu uyi ga cyux maki heci ro kintiyaw, ro uka nanu yaw mu lga musa ku mtiyaw qmayah, musa krmaw mtiyaw i laqi, ro bsyaq bsyaq bsyaq lga bsyaq la akya tuyu tiyu kawas la,ro mwani lga kingan nanaq maki muyaw la, ro laqi ga nya maki yaw naha nanaq cyux mtiyaw nanaq tanux uyi laqi uyi ru, mago mu uyi cyu mulu yaw maki tanux uyi, ro ini mwah mita kruma siga mhngaw mwah i kintayux kingan, ro qnxan mu ga ini cu mtiyaw uy laro, .
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki qalaŋ s~ɕeŋan, ɣlax s~ɕjax na lljuŋ mniβu, ini knβawiq uji, akja s~ɕajiŋ kβħul meta. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** imi na βŋwan ɣa, maki ββinaħ qalaŋ ini ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕjax ini ɣa rɣjax, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa qalaŋ βŋwan ɣa mnaki βinaħ qalaŋ s~ɕen-ɣan, ro ks~ɕoβiħ s~ɕjax ki rɣjax. βŋwan***,*" . pinjuwan qalaŋ **** qalaŋ βŋwan qani ħija ɣa, ɣariŋ akja qutux qβħul miman ʦ~ʨkawas~ɕ, njan maki ʦ~ʨquliq mqjanux, ʦ~ʨquliq naħa ɣa minkaħul ɣoaɣan s~ɕki ʦ~ʨqani ħkani xqajus~ɕ na kkian, puqiŋ ɣa mus~ɕa naħa qalaŋ knβuŋ ħa, meħoŋ lɣa uka pinqmaħan nħa ro ħkani loji xqajus~ɕ na kkian, mus~ɕa naħa tnqalaŋ, meħoŋ lɣa maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq knaħul qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ,talaħ, mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tnmujax, ini ɣa jome, βaβaw nja lɣa mwaħ s~ɕexu ipun la, ro ps~ɕalun naħa ro ps~ɕljun naħa kja qutux kkiʔan qa tajal ɣlux qutux qalaŋ mnojan qani, teħok qa rjax s~ɕexu ʦ~ʨjukok lɣa tɣariŋ kβlajan kis~ɕja la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa pijux qqħoniq maki tajpins~ɕan, kmut naħa kħoniq ro matu s~ɕki lotuŋ, miʦ~ʨa qa pijux kaħat mwaħ uji la, ħriqun naħa ɣaɣa na tajal uji. ro qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ s~ɕta qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal tjuɣan kawas~ɕ lɣa, knaħul lljuŋ ɣoɣan qalaŋ ħkawan ro ɣiħiŋ pins~ɕqunan mpux maɣan ʦ~ʨinmujax, mpitu mpux s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ mwaħ qalaŋ qani, ro ms~ɕqun ɣmojax mrħow ka knaħul ɣiħiŋ mwaħ na peħu talan. ****-****(** **-***)*,*ɣoɣan** * ħkawan,ɣiħiŋ peħu talan***. tajal qa njan qalaŋ βŋwan mwani **** mwani ɣa maɣan ʦ~ʨinmujax mpux s~ɕpat ʦ~ʨquliq qjanux maki ʦ~ʨqani, qalaŋ na s~ɕjanoħ rjaniq mtiju. ro maki qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpus~ɕal kawas~ɕ ɣa, laxan naħa qalaŋ qani, qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ la, ro maki qutux s~ɕeŋ mqes~ɕu kβħul mpitu mpux s~ɕajiŋ kawas~ɕ ɣa, tjaβa βeħuj ro wajal ħorun qs~ɕja qaβax qalaŋ qani. mwani ɣa s~ɕtħaj ʦ~ʨipak ʦ~ʨquliq maki ʦ~ʨani, pijux ʦ~ʨquliq wajal βinaħ qalaŋ ini ɣa mus~ɕa ħeʦ~ʨi, akja miman kawas~ɕ juŋa lɣa uka ʦ~ʨalaj tajal pklaħaŋ qalaŋ qani la, mwani ɣa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq kmajal ke tajal la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa wajal qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa laro, ini βaqi kmajan uji ke tajal uji qaβax laqi kinβaħan. qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ βŋwan ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja,paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβlaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ,**. rrjaniq qalaŋ **** uʔteŋ s~ɕu ħaja ɣa, kaħul s~ɕu lutuŋ ro s~ɕi ɣlɣan rjaniq ***s~ɕħoju s~ɕkura s~ɕens~ɕe mus~ɕa, ro teħik s~ɕu ħoŋu**lɣa, akja ini kβs~ɕjaq tħeħok s~ɕu uji qalaŋ βnwan. ** ***: ***>***>***>**** kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** uka kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi qa qalaŋ s~ɕeŋan qani ħija. . ɣaɣa qalaŋ **** qalaŋ βŋwan qani ɣa qalaŋ kaħat, nanaq ʦ~ʨipak ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa tajal. kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, ro uka uji kβlaj jaw na ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. . ʦ~ʨipak kinβaqan na ɣaɣa watan s~ɕujan**: maki ʦ~ʨami ħos~ɕjo **ʦ~ʨjuŋa, ɣariŋ **ro βs~ɕjaq i ini s~ɕami uluw pila ʦ~ʨjuŋa ro, ro s~ɕiɣa mus~ɕa i mus~ɕa s~ɕħos~ɕjo ɣa maki ʦ~ʨja pila nja, ro βs~ɕjaq qa kmaki kja i oβiħ kja ni neŋ, oβiħ ni neŋ mus~ɕa ku i ħos~ɕjo lro mulu ku raŋi kaħat la, muluw kraŋi kaħat lro, mwaħ s~ɕu ptjawun maɣe mu ro, ini mu qβaq s~ɕon mu, ʦ~ʨβaqaj mis~ɕu maħa mus~ɕa ku ɣalan i ħos~ɕju la, pijux ħaji pila maɣe ħija ro, ro mus~ɕa maɣe lɣa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa raŋi mu ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa kmajal maħa a kħnaɣi ʦ~ʨja ħa ki, kħaŋi ʦ~ʨja ħa, ana s~ɕajiŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣan mwaħ ɣlux is~ɕu ma, maħa uka ħaji ʦ~ʨquliq ma, ro mus~ɕa lɣa, pijux ras~ɕun mu la, pajat ħe ana kiŋan ɣa maɣan ʦ~ʨami ħe mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨami maɣe la, ɣariŋ maɣe s~ɕami lɣa, pijux ħaji pila ɣalun ɣa, us~ɕ ɣa ɣariŋ s~ɕaniq mus~ɕa ro ɣβjan mwaħ, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa mtijaw s~ɕami ʦ~ʨa ɣa, pijux ɣalun s~ɕu qħoniq ɣa, pijux pila nja, pila ni tnββaw ʦ~ʨa, ro kjalun mu raŋi mu, pajat ħe ana kiŋan ʦ~ʨjuɣan ħe ro, βaβaw nja lɣa maras~ɕ ku s~ɕajiŋ ħe, maras~ɕ s~ɕajiŋ ħe tajal la, βs~ɕjaq ʦ~ʨa maki s~ɕami maɣe lro, (maki inu?) βaβaw qani, maɣan inu lawpan mjan ɣa, mus~ɕa s~ɕami ira kja, mus~ɕa qumaħ kja, mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨu ɣa kruma pijux jaw ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕami kja ɣa, ro βaβaw nja lɣa, ini s~ɕwali knut qħoniq, ini s~ɕwalij**uji, meħoŋ lɣa mwaħ ʦ~ʨami mujaw la, mwaħ mujaw lro mwaħ kmuja ʦ~ʨikaj ramat uji, kja i iʦ~ʨi neŋ βs~ɕjaw muja ku ramat, rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ini qβaq mlaħaŋ ramat jaqiħ neraŋ nja ro, ɣalan reŋwa raŋi mu maħa ʦ~ʨjux tjawun kja s~ɕon mu ro, maki ma kjalun mu ħija, ana knwan s~ɕu mwaħ ɣa uja ma ħaw, mus~ɕa ku loji ɣa ro tɣariŋ ptuwun**la, inŋlis~ɕan ptjawun **qani , s~ɕiɣa βaq s~ɕu mkaraw, βaq ʦ~ʨu i trkax ro βaq s~ɕu nanu ɣa βaq s~ɕu mtijaw ʦ~ʨikaj ħa ɣa s~ɕijon kaħat ro, ro βs~ɕjaq maki kja lɣa, kmajal maħa ħkaŋi raŋi s~ɕu ki maħa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa njan nja tajux ʦ~ʨami qanijat mtijaw, qanijat ro ħkaŋi ma, ħkaŋi βes~ɕ s~ɕu loji ma, ħkaŋi qalaŋ ta loji, mus~ɕa s~ɕami tijaw la, mlaħaŋ mujaw la, ro ɣariŋ arwa lɣa, s~ɕi ʦ~ʨu kaki mujax la, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa jaqiħ ħe kneril mu ɣa, jaqiħ ħe nja s~ɕi ʦ~ʨu kaki mujax, ro muja ʦ~ʨja ramat la, muja ʦ~ʨikaj ramat (pijux qmajaħ s~ɕu ku?) pijux ɣa ʦ~ʨjux βiqan laqi laru, (pis~ɕa laqi s~ɕu?) qutux neril qutux rikuj (njan maki qalaŋ qaβax?) ʦ~ʨjux maki. mis~ɕuw qani ɣa njux ku maki mujax ro wal i maɣan,tuju ʦ~ʨkawas~ɕ ɣa wajal neril mu la, ro kiŋal nanaq maki mujax, laqi mu uji ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki ħeʦ~ʨi ro kintijaw, ro uka nanu jaw mu lɣa mus~ɕa ku mtijaw qmajaħ, mus~ɕa krmaw mtijaw i laqi, ro βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq βs~ɕjaq lɣa βs~ɕjaq la akja tuju tiju kawas~ɕ la,ro mwani lɣa kiŋan nanaq maki mujaw la, ro laqi ɣa nja maki jaw naħa nanaq ʦ~ʨjux mtijaw nanaq tanux uji laqi uji ru, maɣo mu uji ʦ~ʨju mulu jaw maki tanux uji, ro ini mwaħ mita kruma s~ɕiɣa mħŋaw mwaħ i kintajux kiŋan, ro qnxan mu ɣa ini ʦ~ʨu mtijaw uj laro, .
